name: Keto Wheat Pancake Mix
description: Low in carbs, high in flavor! With just 2g of net carbs, our quick and simple mix makes it easy to keep your carbs low and your mornings delicious! These keto-friendly pancakes boast 9g of protein and 12g of fiber. Simply add water, and you’re well on your way to stacks of tender, fluffy pancakes perfect for breakfast or even dinner. A convenient, resealable, and recyclable pouch makes it easy to portion just the right amount or save some for next time.

name: Alaskan Sourdough Yeast Bread Mix
description: You'll be serving fresh bread from the oven in no time. Turn out a warm loaf of traditional sourdough bread with a chewy texture, a mild sourdough flavor, and a crunchy crust. Shape into a rustic boule, bake in a traditional loaf pan, or divide and make into dinner rolls. Can be made in a bread machine, using the basic dough cycle. Add the ingredients in the order that your bread machine instructions advise. Homemade bread is one of life's greatest pleasures, and our mixes help you bake it easily at home. Made with only the simple, good, non-GMO ingredients you want and nothing you don't: no artificial sweeteners or flavors, no artificial colors, and no high-fructose corn syrup. name: All-American Fudge Brownie Mix
description: Deep, dark, rich brownies are just a few steps away with our easy mix. Our premium brownie mix is made with unbleached King Arthur Flour and a blend of flavorful cocoas. Just add eggs, butter or vegetable oil, and water, and you're well on your way to delicious, chocolatey, homemade brownies! Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes. The best part? We do the measuring and mixing for you. The result? Consistent deliciousness that everyone can enjoy made with simple ingredients that we bake with every day in our kitchens — no artificial colors or flavors, no preservatives, and all non-GMO. Perfect Pairing: Cyprus Flake Sea Salt - Elevate your brownies with a touch of flaky sea salt. High Altitude Baking: Keep oven temperature at 325°F. Use a 9-inch square pan if adding nuts or chips to the recipe. 6 tablespoons melted butter yields better results...

name: All-Purpose Baking Mix
description: All-Purpose Baking Mix: simple ingredients, endless possibilities. With just four ingredients — flour, baking powder, sugar, and salt — our All-Purpose Baking Mix keeps things simple, so you can focus on the fun part: baking! This custom blend lets you create everything from fluffy pancakes and waffles to flaky biscuits, with extra options like banana bread, chocolate cake, sugar cookies, and doughnut holes (check out this recipe collection!). It's also a great choice for vegan and dairy-free recipes. With 6 grams of prebiotic fiber per serving to support gut health and a resealable pouch for easy storage, it’s the simple solution for delicious, convenient baking.
ingredients: Ingredients Ingredients Ingredients Extracts & Flavorings Spices & Pantry Fruit Add-Ins & Jams

name: Almond-Filled Sweet Bread Mix
description: The ultimate sweet bread for almond fans! Swirled with a toasted almond filling, this sweet bread is a buttery treat that is easy to make and shape with the help of our mix. To elevate to a heavenly level, top with Almond Glaze for an extra touch of almondy sweetness and picturesque finishing touch. Serve as a tasty centerpiece on any brunch or dessert table.Homemade bread is one of life's greatest pleasures, and our mixes help you bake it easily at home. Made with only the simple, good, non-GMO ingredients you want and nothing you don't: no artificial sweeteners or flavors, no artificial colors, and no high-fructose corn syrup. You'll be serving fresh bread from the oven in no time. Video: How to knead bread dough Video: How to tell if bread dough is fully kneaded

name: Apple Cinnamon Doughnut Mix
description: Cinnamon doughnuts studded with dried apple bits. Find out just how delicious a baked doughnut can be! Drizzle these Apple Cinnamon Doughnuts with your own melted caramel for an over-the-top treat. Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes. The best part? We do the measuring and mixing for you. The result? Consistent deliciousness that everyone can enjoy made with simple ingredients that we bake with every day in our kitchens — no artificial colors or flavors, no preservatives, and all non-GMO.

name: Apple Cinnamon Scone Mix
description: Enjoy sweet fall flavors in your kitchen all year long with apple cinnamon scones. Made with the finest Vietnamese cinnamon, real apples, and apple cinnamon jammy bits, our simple mix bakes up light, tall, and fluffy. Freshly baked homemade scones are quick and easy with our simple scone mixes. Perfect for serving at breakfast, an afternoon snack, for yourself, your family, or your guests. Simply blend, shape, and bake for warm, delicious scones in fewer than 30 minutes.

name: Apple-Cinnamon Whole Grain Muffin and Quick Bread Mix
description: Apple Cinnamon Muffins made with buttermilk for an even more tender crumb and delectable flavor. Fragrant with spicy cinnamon and studded with dried apple bits, these tender and light muffins taste just like fall-—and you can enjoy the seasonal flavor all year long! Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes. The best part? We do the measuring and mixing for you. The result? Consistent deliciousness that everyone can enjoy made with simple ingredients that we bake with every day in our kitchens — no artificial colors or flavors, no preservatives, and all non-GMO.

name: Apricot Sour Cream Scone Mix
description: The perfect balance of tangy sour cream and sweet apricot in a tender, buttery scone. With our our easy-to-make mix, you can experience bursts of bright fruity flavor in each bite thanks to our soft and chewy Apricot Jammy Bits, made with real apricots. Freshly baked homemade scones are quick and easy with our simple scone mixes. Perfect for serving at breakfast, an afternoon snack, for yourself, your family, or your guests. Simply blend, shape, and bake for warm, delicious scones in fewer than 30 minutes.

name: Banana Bread Mix
description: Simple, classic banana bread in no time. Enjoy a cozy loaf of banana bread in under an hour — just add water, oil, and eggs. Real bananas and a hint of cinnamon create a tender, perfectly sweet quick bread that’s delicious on its own or easy to customize with chocolate chips, nuts, or any favorite additions. Bake it as a loaf or turn it into muffins — it’s a reliable, comforting treat for breakfast, with coffee, or anytime you want something warm and homemade.

name: Belgian Waffle Mix
description: Restaurant-style, deep-pocketed waffles. With corn flour for color and texture and a hint of maple and malt, this European-style yeasted waffle mix makes incredible waffles that are crisp and golden on the outside while being light and fluffy on the inside! Serve with whipped cream and strawberries, as we do here in America, or serve as they do in Belgium: dusted with confectioners' sugar or topped with whipped cream or chocolate spread. They may also be enjoyed with ice cream, for dessert. Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes. The best part? We do the measuring and mixing for you. The result? Consistent deliciousness that everyone can enjoy made with simple ingredients that we bake with every day in our kitchens — no artificial colors or flavors, no preservatives, and all non-GMO.

name: Blueberry Sour Cream Scone Mix
description: Start your morning with blueberry scones! Tart blueberries blend perfectly with tangy sour cream — perfect alongside a hot cup of coffee or tea. Freshly baked homemade scones are quick and easy with our simple scone mixes. Perfect for serving at breakfast, an afternoon snack, for yourself, your family, or your guests. Simply blend, shape, and bake for warm, delicious scones in fewer than 30 minutes.

name: Broccoli Cheddar Soup
description: Savor the rich, nourishing taste of homemade soup, made easy using our premium mix. If we're not cooking from scratch, we're mixing up delicious soups from Frontier's convenient mixes. Made with the finest natural ingredients, no added salt, no preservatives or MSG, you can taste the difference — our families and friends always ask for the recipe! Comforting, thick, cheesy broccoli cheddar soup is a classic. Simply add broth and cream for a warm, just-cooked dinner on the table.

name: Bûche de Noël Pan and Gluten-Free Chocolate Cake Mix
description: Chocolatey and easy-to-make gluten-free Bûche de Noël! We've paired the beautifully detailed Bûche de Noël Cake Pan with our Deliciously Simple Chocolate Cake Mix for the ultimate holiday treat without the hassle. Simply prepare our mix as directed, pour it into the pan, and soon, you'll be enjoying moist, fudgy gluten-free chocolate cake shaped like a beautiful yule log, or Bûche de Noël. Beautiful as-is or decorate with frosting or a dusting of confectioners' sugar.
ingredients: Ingredients Ingredients Ingredients Extracts & Flavorings Spices & Pantry Fruit Add-Ins & Jams

name: Buttercream Frosting Mix
description: Making the perfect frosting couldn't be easier with our buttercream mix. Our recipe makes an ultra-fluffy, creamy frosting with a classic buttercream taste. With its smooth, spreadable texture and old-fashioned vanilla flavor, this mix saves you time without sacrificing flavor. Just add butter and water and mix.

name: Buttermilk Doughnut Mix
description: Dipped into coffee, drizzled with syrup, or smeared with jam, there are so many ways buttermilk doughnuts make us smile. These delicious doughnuts are BAKED, not deep-fried, so you can enjoy this timeless treat guilt-free. Find out just how delicious a baked doughnut can be! Simply blend with your own fresh ingredients, spoon into doughnut pan, and bake. Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes. The best part? We do the measuring and mixing for you. The result? Consistent deliciousness that everyone can enjoy made with simple ingredients that we bake with every day in our kitchens — no artificial colors or flavors, no preservatives, and all non-GMO.

name: Buttermilk Doughnut Mix and Mini Doughnut Pan Set
description: What's better than a doughnut? ...A mini doughnut! Yes, please! Make perfectly shaped baked (not fried!) mini doughnuts at home with our pan and mix set. We've paired our delicious Buttermilk Doughnut Mix with our Mini Doughnut Pan. Add your batter to the pan and bake. The nonstick pans are designed to easily release your doughnuts. The mix makes tender buttermilk doughnut which are the perfect blank canvas for any glazes you like, or dip them in melted chocolate or sprinkles! For perfectly shaped doughnuts, use a piping bag to evenly fill each well.

name: Buttermilk Pancake Mix
description: Buttermilk pancakes - the hero of the breakfast table. There's nothing quite like a stack of tender, fluffy, buttermilk pancakes, and our mix makes it easy to make this breakfast staple at home. Made with real buttermilk, these pancakes rival the stack from your favorite diner. Simply add water, and you're well on your way to syrup-worthy pancakes. A convenient, resealable and recyclable pouch makes it easy to portion just the right amount or take it on the go. Deliciously fluffy with golden, crisp edges and an irresistable buttermilk flavor, it's arguably the best buttermilk pancake mix. Check out pancake recipes using this mix, here.  Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes. The best part? We do the measuring and mixing for you. The result? Consistent deliciousness that everyone can enjoy made with simple ingredients that we bake with...

name: Butterscotch Blondie Mix
description: Bake-and-go butterscotch bliss! Sweet, chewy, and loaded with rich butterscotch flavor, our Butterscotch Blondie Mix bakes up irresistibly fudgy bars with golden edges and a soft center. Made with butterscotch chips for a deep caramel-like sweetness, they’re easily customizable with your favorite mix-ins — try chocolate or a handful of chopped nuts to make it your own! You’ll find our maple glaze recipe on the back of the box.

name: Cherry Almond Scone Mix
description: The scone mix we all want on our shelf! Life (or at least breakfast) is a bowl of cherries with our tender Cherry Almond Scone Mix. Our King Arthur scone mix is loaded with a perfect balance of tartness and sweetness: red sour Oregon cherries and sun-kissed California almonds. It's a match made in scone heaven, which we truly believe exists! Freshly baked homemade scones are quick and easy with our simple scone mixes. Perfect for serving at breakfast, an afternoon snack, for yourself, your family, or your guests. Simply blend, shape, and bake for warm, delicious scones in fewer than 30 minutes.

name: Chicken Stew
description: Add your own fresh chicken, broth, and optional extra ingredients. If we're not cooking from scratch, we're mixing up delicious soups from Frontier's convenient mixes. Made with the finest natural ingredients, no added salt, no preservatives or MSG, you can taste the difference — our families and friends always ask for the recipe! With its blend of peas, carrots, potatoes, and white beans and just the right seasoning, this soup is as thick and rich as the inside of a chicken pot pie. Just add onion, broth, and chicken for a hearty stew ready in only 30 minutes.

name: Chocolate Babka Mix
description: Soft, sweet, and loaded with rich chocolate. Our chocolate babka is as striking as it is delicious with its thick ribbon of rich, fudgy chocolate swirled inside a moist brioche-like bread. We love wrapping up this bread for a unique edible gift or making it for a festive centerpiece. Our mix makes it easy to bake this bread with impressive results. Homemade bread is one of life's greatest pleasures, and our mixes help you bake it easily at home. Made with only the simple, good, non-GMO ingredients you want and nothing you don't: no artificial sweeteners or flavors, no artificial colors, and no high-fructose corn syrup. You'll be serving fresh bread from the oven in no time.

name: Chocolate Buttercream Frosting Mix
description: Making the perfect frosting couldn't be easier with our buttercream mix. Our recipe makes the fluffiest, creamiest chocolate frosting with a luscious texture and sweet, classic buttercream flavor. Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes. The best part? We do the measuring and mixing for you. The result? Consistent deliciousness that everyone can enjoy made with simple ingredients that we bake with every day in our kitchens — no artificial colors or flavors, no preservatives, and all non-GMO.
ingredients: Ingredients Ingredients Ingredients Extracts & Flavorings Spices & Pantry Fruit Add-Ins & Jams

name: Chocolate Cake Mix and Bûche de Noël Pan Set
description: Chocolatey and easy-to-make Bûche de Noël! We've paired the beautifully detailed Bûche de Noël Cake Pan with our Deliciously Simple Chocolate Cake Mix for the ultimate holiday treat without the hassle. Simply prepare our mix as directed, pour it into the pan, and soon, you'll be enjoying moist, fudgy chocolate cake shaped like a beautiful yule log or Bûche de Noël. Beautiful as-is or decorate with frosting or a dusting of confectioners' sugar.

name: Chocolate Chunk Scone Mix
description: We all know chocolate makes everything better, and our Chocolate Chunk scones are no exception. Not overly sweet, these tender, moist chocolate chip scones are full of rich chocolate for a melt-in-your-mouth treat, any time of day. Freshly baked homemade scones are quick and easy with our simple scone mixes. Perfect for serving at breakfast, an afternoon snack, for yourself, your family, or your guests. Simply blend, shape, and bake for warm, delicious scones in fewer than 30 minutes.

name: Chocolate Indulgence Cake Mix
description: The ultimate chocolate dessert! We call this the "chocolate indulgence" for good reason: it's exceptionally dark, dense, moist, and rich. Made with cocoa powder and two kinds of chocolate, our mix yields an impressive and elegant dessert. Mix includes bittersweet chocolate discs to make a satiny smooth glaze. Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes. The best part? We do the measuring and mixing for you. The result? Consistent deliciousness that everyone can enjoy made with simple ingredients that we bake with every day in our kitchens — no artificial colors or flavors, no preservatives, and all non-GMO.

name: Chocolate Indulgence Mix & Tree Mold
description: Create a sweet holiday centerpiece with this set! Bake an adorable (and delicious) chocolate tree for the holidays with this festive set. It includes our flexible silicone Evergreen Tree Cake Mold, designed for perfectly shaped cakes every time, plus our Chocolate Indulgence Cake Mix — a rich, dark, and decadent cake topped with a silky ganache. Together, they make it easy to create a showstopping dessert for any festive gathering. Place mold on a sheet pan to make transport to and from the oven easier. Bake at 325°F for 52 minutes. Let cake cool to room temperature, place a serving dish on top of the mold, and flip to release the cake.

name: Chocolate Lava Cake Mix
description: This rich, moist chocolate cake makes its own hot fudge sauce. Just cut it open and enjoy the molten treasure inside. Made with King Arthur Flour, sweet chocolate, dark cocoa, and pure premium vanilla. Hot fudge flows from the center of this cake. Ready in under 20 minutes! Just add water, butter, and eggs, bake, and enjoy! Bake in standard custard cups or silicone molds. Cakes may be refrigerated or frozen in silicone molds until ready to bake. Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes. The best part? We do the measuring and mixing for you. The result? Consistent deliciousness that everyone can enjoy made with simple ingredients that we bake with every day in our kitchens — no artificial colors or flavors, no preservatives, and all non-GMO.
ingredients: Ingredients Ingredients Ingredients Extracts & Flavorings Spices & Pantry Fruit Add-Ins & Jams

name: Cinnamon Bun Mix
description: Warm, gooey cinnamon buns, made easy. It's a well-known fact that a cinnamon bun is one of the best breakfasts to grace the kitchen table, and this mix makes it all possible. Soft and fluffy with a swirl of cinnamon tucked inside and a golden top crust drizzled with vanilla glaze - it doesn't get much better (or easier!) than this. Our cinnamon bun recipe is made with only the simple, good, non-GMO ingredients you want and nothing you don't. Our mix makes it easy to bake these classic cinnamon rolls at home so you can enjoy more time around the table with loved ones.

name: Cinnamon Pecan Scone Mix
description: Cinnamon scones with an extra boost of pecan goodness. With our simple scone mix, fresh, homemade scones are quick and easy—ready in under 30 minutes! Made with our signature Vietnamese cinnamon, sweet cinnamon bits, and crunchy diced pecans, this mix brings irresistible flavor to every bite. Perfect for breakfast, an afternoon treat, or sharing with family and friends. Just mix, shape, and bake for warm, golden scones that fill your kitchen with the cozy scent of cinnamon and nuts.

name: Classic Chewy Bagel Mix Kit
description: Fresh-from-the-oven bagels made easy! Warm, chewy, and ready in just an hour, these homemade bagels bring bagel-shop goodness to your kitchen with ease — simply add water! Each batch makes eight bagels with a crisp, golden crust and soft, chewy interior. Delicious on their own, perfect for breakfast sandwiches, and great for customizing with mix-ins or toppings. Click on the Classic Chewy Bagels Recipe below for tips to add our Cinnamon Sweet Bits or Blueberry Jammy Bits! Makes: 8 Bagels 16 Cream Cheese-Stuffed Bagel Pockets 12 Everything Bagel Twists 24 Mini Pizza Bagels 3 cups Bagel Chips

name: Coconut Macaroon Cookie Mix
description: Coconut macaroons made super-simple! Just add water, scoop, and bake. If you love coconut, this is your cookie. Ever so slightly toasty on the outside, moist and chewy inside, you can dress macaroons up even more by making them thumbprint style and placing a chocolate disk on top when they come out of the oven. Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes. The best part? We do the measuring and mixing for you. The result? Consistent deliciousness that everyone can enjoy made with simple ingredients that we bake with every day in our kitchens — no artificial colors or flavors, no preservatives, and all non-GMO.

name: Coffee Cake Mix
description: Coffee cake ready in under an hour! Warm, buttery, and filled with cinnamon goodness, this classic coffee cake delivers the comfort of a homemade treat with little effort. Inside, a thick ribbon of cinnamon swirls through the center, topped off with a generous, crunchy crumble topping. Quick and easy to bake in under an hour, this convenient mix only needs butter, eggs, and milk. Perfect for breakfast, a coffee break, or dessert, it’s the kind of cake that impresses without the fuss. Serving suggestion: finish the coffee cake with a dusting of confectioner's sugar or a vanilla glaze, if desired.
ingredients: Ingredients Ingredients Ingredients Extracts & Flavorings Spices & Pantry Fruit Add-Ins & Jams

name: Country Blueberry Muffin and Quick Bread Mix
description: Our take on classic blueberry muffins. This mix is made with buttermilk for an even more tender crumb and delectable taste. Bursting with flavor and packed with dried blueberries in every bite, these muffins satisfy every breakfast craving. Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes. The best part? We do the measuring and mixing for you. The result? Consistent deliciousness that everyone can enjoy made with simple ingredients that we bake with every day in our kitchens — no artificial colors or flavors, no preservatives, and all non-GMO.
ingredients: Ingredients Ingredients Ingredients Extracts & Flavorings Spices & Pantry Fruit Add-Ins & Jams

name: Cran-Raspberry White Chocolate Scone Mix
description: Cranberries and raspberries and white chocolate - oh my! These berry scones are a guaranteed showstopper. Our tender, buttery scones are studded with tangy dried cranberries, creamy white chocolate chips, and sweet, chewy raspberry jammy bits. Freshly baked homemade scones are quick and easy with our simple scone mixes. Perfect for serving at breakfast, an afternoon snack, for yourself, your family, or your guests. Simply blend, shape, and bake for warm, delicious scones in fewer than 30 minutes.

name: Cranberry-Orange Muffin and Quick Bread Mix
description: Cranberry-Orange Muffins made with buttermilk for an even more tender crumb and delectable flavor. Tart-sweet cranberries mingle with a hint of bright orange flavor in every bite of these moist muffins. They please every crowd, whether it's a Sunday morning family breakfast to or a weekday lunchbox snack. Or use the same mix to whip up a quick loaf of Cranberry-Orange Bread! Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes. The best part? We do the measuring and mixing for you. The result? Consistent deliciousness that everyone can enjoy made with simple ingredients that we bake with every day in our kitchens — no artificial colors or flavors, no preservatives, and all non-GMO.

name: Cranberry-Orange Scone Mix
description: Make Cranberry-Orange Scones in a pinch with our best-selling mix. Bring the tangy taste of cranberries and the zestiness of oranges to the table with our Cranberry-Orange Scone Mix! Deliciously flaky and tender with bright citrus flavor and pops of juicy berries - it's no surprise this is our #1 selling mix! Freshly baked homemade scones are quick and easy with our simple scone mixes. Perfect for serving at breakfast, an afternoon snack, for yourself, your family, or your guests. Simply blend, shape, and bake for warm, delicious scones in fewer than 30 minutes.

name: Cranberry-Orange Scone Mix and Mini Scone Pan Set
description: Save on our classic Cranberry Orange Scone Mix with our duo of specialty scone essentials! It's simple to make tender mini two-bite scones using our delicious mix, bursting with bright orange flavor and tart-sweet cranberries. Whip up the mix batter, then press it into the Mini Scone Pan, which bakes scones gently, leaving them evenly browned outside yet perfectly moist and tender inside. Before baking, top them with our Sparkling Sugar for a crunchy, sugary finishing touch.

name: Crisp & Airy Focaccia Mix Kit
description: Experience the joy of bread baking with our Focaccia Mix Kit! Baking fresh focaccia has never been easier or faster! In just about an hour, you'll savor the soft, airy texture and irresistible crisp crust of homemade focaccia. This easy-to-assemble mix kit includes Focaccia Mix, a yeast packet, along with a rosemary and sea salt blend for topping. Simply add water and oil and follow instructions for a hassle-free process. Gather everyone for a fun-filled baking session and explore the endless possibilities of this versatile mix kit. From the recipe on the back of the box to new recipes online, there are plenty of ways to let your creativity shine! We like using any leftover rosemary and sea salt to create a flavorful dipping oil for the focaccia. Makes: One 9” x 13” or one half-sheet (13” x 18”) Rosemary Sea Salt Focaccia or Golden Potato Focaccia Two 11” or 9” x 13” pizzas 24 breadsticks
ingredients: Ingredients Ingredients Ingredients Extracts & Flavorings Spices & Pantry Fruit Add-Ins & Jams

name: Cupcake Party Kit
description: One set, endless celebrations. Get the party started with the Cupcake Party Kit! Whether it’s a birthday, holiday, or just because, this all-in-one set has everything you need to bake and decorate festive cupcakes for any occasion. Set includes Nonstick Baking Cups, our Golden Yellow Cake Mix, Buttercream Frosting Mix, Pastry Bags and Tips Set, and a set of natural food colors. Best of all, it also includes our How to Guide for Unicorn Cupcakes!

name: Dark Pumpernickel Yeast Bread Mix
description: You'll be serving fresh bread from the oven in no time. With a rich pumpernickel flavor and a luscious crumb, there's nothing quite like this hearty, dark loaf. Made with a blend of our all-purpose, whole rye, and potato flours, plus a touch of sweet molasses and caraway seeds. Try it toasted, spread with whipped honey or some raspberry or apricot jam, or use as sandwich bread — you can't go wrong! Homemade bread is one of life's greatest pleasures, and our mixes help you bake it easily at home. Made with only the simple, good, non-GMO ingredients you want and nothing you don't: no artificial sweeteners or flavors, no artificial colors, and no high-fructose corn syrup. Video: How to knead bread dough Video: How to tell if bread dough is fully kneaded

name: Deliciously Simple Chocolate Cake Mix
description: Convenient, easy and chocolatey, our cake mix bakes into a moist, delicious dessert. Moist and fudgy with a velvety texture and rich cocoa flavor, this chocolate cake mix makes the ultimate chocolate cake. Reach for it when you're in a hurry, or want a cake that you know will never fail and everyone will love! Simply stir together eggs, oil, water, and our cake mix, then bake. Finish it off however you like; layer and frost it or sprinkle it with confectioners' sugar. Adding a cup of chocolate chips wouldn't hurt, either! Try more Chocolate Cake Mix recipes here! Read the blog: An unexpected use for cake mix — cake streusel

name: Deluxe Dog Biscuit Gift
description: Looking for gifts for dog lovers? Stop right here. We’ve gathered all the essentials to pamper your pup, including a soft toy to keep them busy while you whip up some bone-shaped homemade dog biscuits. Gift offers two delicious flavors of dog treats for your pup’s every mood! Makes the perfect present for the proud pooch owners in your life or for your own four-legged friend.

name: Diner-Style Pancake & Waffle Mix
description: This pancake mix makes the best diner-style pancakes at home! Whether you're looking for a pancake mix or a waffle mix, this mix does both perfectly. Get ready for a stack of the fluffiest, golden pancakes and deliciously crisp and golden waffles. Pancakes are reminiscent of those served at an all-American diner. Flavored with malt and rich buttermilk for added flavor and tenderness, it's the best pancake mix for diner-style pancakes — you'll never have to get dressed to enjoy them again! Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes. The best part? We do the measuring and mixing for you. The result? Consistent deliciousness that everyone can enjoy, made with simple ingredients we bake with every day in our kitchens — no artificial colors or flavors, no preservatives, and all non-GMO.

name: Double Pie Crust Mix
description: Our simple mix bakes up a flaky, buttery pie crust. Finally, pie crust success is easy with our simple mix, which bakes up a flaky, buttery crust every time. Each box makes enough for a 9" double-crust pie — or two 9" single-crust pies — so you’ll always have pie crust at your fingertips. Keep a box in your pantry for quick, perfect results whenever the mood for pie strikes!

name: Doughnut Mix Variety Pack and Doughnut Pan Set
description: Did someone say doughnut? For delicious donuts (or doughnuts), our mixes are the ideal solution. They're a simple way to make tender baked doughnuts at home, in three delicious varieties: Buttermilk, Ultimate Chocolate and Apple Cinnamon. To make it even more convenient and cost-effective, we've bundled them with our easy-to-clean Standard Doughnut Pan. Our mixes offer an easy way to bake. You can rely on them for delicious, consistent results; your family and friends will look forward to them every time. To make them the best (award-winning!) they can be, we start by selecting our very favorite, tried-and-true recipes. We do the measuring and mixing for you. It cuts time, not corners: all you need to do is bake! We use only simple, good ingredients — the sort we bake with every day in our kitchens. No artificial colors or flavors and all non-GMO. For perfectly shaped doughnuts, use a piping bag to evenly fill each well.
ingredients: Ingredients Ingredients Ingredients Extracts & Flavorings Spices & Pantry Fruit Add-Ins & Jams

name: French Toast Scone Mix
description: Embrace the traditional taste of rich eggy custard, vanilla, and a hint of maple in our tender French Toast Scones. Made with our finest Vietnamese Cinnamon, Cinnamon Flakes, and nutmeg. Freshly baked homemade scones are quick and easy with our simple scone mixes. Perfect for serving at breakfast, an afternoon snack, for yourself, your family, or your guests. Simply blend, shape, and bake for warm, delicious scones in fewer than 30 minutes.

name: Gingerbread Cake & Cookie Mix
description: It's always the season for warm gingerbread! Fill your kitchen with nostalgic aromas and create whatever you crave with this one convenient gingerbread mix. Whether you use it to make gingerbread cookies or a gingerbread cake - it's guaranteed to satisfy all your gingerbread cravings! Spiced with molasses, ginger, and cinnamon, it's a classic holiday treat no pantry should be without.

name: Gluten-Free All-Purpose Biscuit & Baking Mix
description: Stock your pantry with our all-purpose gluten-free baking mix and you're never far from reliably delicious gluten-free baking. Quite possibly the best thing to happen to gluten-free bakers, this mix is ideal for everything from pancakes at breakfast to biscuits with dinner to shortcake for dessert. With 20 grams of whole grains per serving, you can feel good about using it for all your best recipes. Bakers love this mix for how convenient it makes gluten-free recipes, and there's no grittiness or aftertaste. Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes. The result? Mixes that make the finest gluten-free baked goods around. Simple ingredients, reliable results, and deliciousness that everyone can enjoy! Discover recipes using Gluten-Free Baking Mix. Click here to learn more about allergens and cross-contact prevention

name: Gluten-Free Banana Bread and Muffin Mix
description: A gluten-free banana bread so good, it's bananas. The best gluten-free banana bread or banana muffins you'll ever bake, in an easy-to-use mix. We believe in food that's delicious and that you can feel good about, so we start with the best ingredients around to make a moist, superior banana bread with the classic flavor you love. Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes. The result? Mixes that make the finest gluten-free baked goods around. Simple ingredients, reliable results, and deliciousness that everyone can enjoy! name: Gluten-Free Bread and Pizza Mix
description: We spent years perfecting our Gluten-Free Bread and Pizza Mix, and the results are impressive. It looks and slices like traditional wheat flour without any grittiness or aftertaste. Easy to prepare, our mix yields superior results every time and can easily be used to make gluten-free bread and gluten-free pizza. Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes. The result? Mixes that make the finest gluten-free baked goods around. Simple ingredients, reliable results, and deliciousness that everyone can enjoy! name: Gluten-Free Chocolate Cake Mix
description: This delicious, rich cake just happens to be gluten-free, but we've never met anyone who can ever resist a slice. With a tender and moist texture and an intense, oh-so-chocolatey flavor, this mix is your go-to for birthdays and special occasions. Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes.The result? Mixes that make the finest gluten-free baked goods around. Simple ingredients, reliable results, and deliciousness that everyone can enjoy! name: Gluten-Free Confetti Cake Mix
description: Pure fun! This tender cake, speckled with naturally colored sprinkles, is the perfect way to add some fun to your next celebration (or any happy occasion)! Made with no synthetic flavors, colors, or preservatives, our premium mix makes it easy to whip up this birthday classic in your own kitchen. It's a mix the kids will love to help with, too! Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it’s a tough job, but we’re up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes. The result? Mixes that make the finest gluten-free baked goods around. Simple ingredients, reliable results, and deliciousness that everyone can enjoy! Click here to learn more about allergens and cross-contact prevention »

name: Gluten-Free Cookie Mix
description: Simple pleasures await you in the form of Gluten-Free Chocolate Chip Cookies. The King Arthur Gluten-Free Cookie Mix was created so that everyone can enjoy their favorite cookies, in whatever flavor or variety you love. Our base mix recipe makes a buttery brown sugar cookie, then you can stir in your add-ins to customize: chocolate chips, raisins, dried fruit, and nuts. Make them differently every time if you like, but we promise they'll always taste delicious! Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes.The result? Mixes that make the finest gluten-free baked goods around. Simple ingredients, reliable results, and deliciousness that everyone can enjoy! Click here to learn more about allergens and cross-contact prevention.

name: Gluten-Free Cornbread and Muffin Mix
description: Finally, Gluten-Free Cornbread! This golden, tender cornbread is easy to prepare with our Gluten-Free Cornbread Mix (we've measured and mixed the same great ingredients you love for you!), loaded with whole grains (that means good and good for you), and is difficult to resist (trust us, we've tried). The mix, made with whole sorghum flour, makes a slightly sweet cornbread with a moist texture. Perfect alongside soup and stews or with a salad. Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes. The result? Mixes that make the finest gluten-free baked goods around. Simple ingredients, reliable results, and deliciousness that everyone can enjoy! name: Gluten-Free Doughnut Mix
description: Fresh, hot doughnuts are the ultimate treat. Our mix gives you a helping hand and turns out perfect batches of gluten-free doughnuts every time. Baked, not fried, so you can enjoy this classic gluten-free and guilt-free. Just mix together the butter, oil, milk, and eggs into the mix, fill the wells of your doughnut pan, bake, and enjoy. Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes. The result? Mixes that make the finest gluten-free baked goods around. Simple ingredients, reliable results, and deliciousness for everyone to enjoy! You'll need a doughnut pan to bake this mix. name: Gluten-Free Fudge Brownie Mix
description: Fudgy, rich, gluten-free brownies are easy to make with this handy mix. With a smooth texture and deep chocolate flavor, it's a favorite among brownie lovers. Keep it in your pantry so you're never far from a delicious dessert! Just stir in 2 eggs, melted butter or vegetable oil, and water. Spoon into your pan, bake, and enjoy. Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes. The result? Mixes that make the finest gluten-free baked goods around. Simple ingredients, reliable results, and deliciousness that everyone can enjoy! name: Gluten-Free Muffin Mix
description: Ready to taste the best gluten-free muffin mix in the country? We thought so. We start with the best ingredients and mix and measure them for you, so that warm and delicious muffins are just minutes away. Customize these tender muffins with your favorite add-ins: blueberries, chocolate chips, and dried cranberries are some of our go-tos! Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes. The result? Mixes that make the finest gluten-free baked goods around. Simple ingredients, reliable results, and deliciousness that everyone can enjoy! Grab a King Arthur muffin mix today. Click here to learn more about allergens and cross-contact prevention

name: Gluten-Free Pancake Mix
description: Our very own — King Arthur Gluten-Free Pancake Mix! Finally, a gluten-free pancake mix that's simple to prepare and tastes delicious. Easy gluten-free pancakes are a click away. Keep your pantry stocked with our gluten-free mix — a weekend breakfast essential — and enjoy tender, fluffy pancakes (or waffles) at a moment's notice. We love them plain or dressed up with fresh fruit or chocolate chips. Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes. The result? Mixes that make the finest gluten-free baked goods around. Simple ingredients, reliable results, and deliciousness that everyone can enjoy! Click here to learn more about allergens and cross-contact prevention

name: Gluten-Free Pie Crust Mix
description: Finally, a perfect gluten-free pie crust! Pie crust can be a true challenge for gluten-free bakers, but our mix makes it easy to get reliable, consistent results. Our mix makes a pie crust that rolls out easily and bakes into a flaky, golden, buttery crust. Fill it with fruit for an apple pie or pastry cream for a custard pie. It's the ideal base for quiches, tarts, and more. Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes. The result? Mixes that make the finest gluten-free baked goods around. Simple ingredients, reliable results, and deliciousness that everyone can enjoy! Click here to learn more about allergens and cross-contact prevention

name: Gluten-Free Protein Pancake Mix
description: Jump-start your day with gluten-free pancakes! These protein pancakes are a cinch to make and are oh so soft, fluffy, and delicious. With 11 grams of plant-based protein and 3 grams of fiber in each serving, you can create the perfect gluten-free breakfast treat, just the way you like it. A convenient, resealable and recyclable pouch makes it easy to portion just the right amount or save some for next time. Our mix is dairy-free with no added sugar, just simple ingredients, reliable results, and deliciousness that everyone can enjoy! Click here to learn more about allergens and cross-contact prevention.

name: Gluten-Free Pumpkin Bread and Muffin Mix
description: Get your fall fix with this Gluten-Free Pumpkin Bread Mix. The delicious flavor of harvest pumpkin in a moist, tender bread. A classic autumn baked good, this sweetly spiced bread is simple to make at home with our mix (as pumpkin bread or pumpkin muffins), and easy to customize with the add-ins of your choice. Our tested formula, made with whole grain rice flour, flax, and real pumpkin, creates a moist, delicious pumpkin bread that is packed full of flavor. Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes. The result? Mixes that make the finest gluten-free baked goods around. Simple ingredients, reliable results, and deliciousness that everyone can enjoy! Click here to learn more about allergens and cross-contact prevention

name: Gluten-Free Scone Mix
description: Our easy scone mix makes delicious, buttery scones...fast! Top with jam or lemon curd for a simple breakfast or with fruit and whipped cream for a decadent dessert. Mix in ¼ cup of your own favorite add-ins: dried blueberries, chocolate chips, dried cranberries, nuts, or whatever you're craving in a scone. They're also delicious plain! Just scoop the dough onto pan, bake, and enjoy. Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes. The result? Mixes that make the finest gluten-free baked goods around. Simple ingredients, reliable results, and deliciousness that everyone can enjoy! Click here to learn more about allergens and cross-contact prevention.

name: Gluten-Free Single Serve Chocolate Chip Cookie Mix - 12-Pack
description: Stock up and save with a 12-pack of our single serve Gluten-Free Chocolate Chip Cookies! Ever wished you could have the ultimate soft-baked chocolate chip cookie appear in front of you? Now you can. With our single-serve mixes, you're only half a minute away from warm, gooey, deliciousness. Nothing artificial...just the good stuff (and your kids will love them too!) Gluten-free, portable, and ready in 30 seconds! Simply add water and microwave for an individual dessert perfectly portioned for one. All the flavor and experience of a homemade cookie with no prep work and no clean-up...and no need to make an entire batch! Take it anywhere...make it anywhere! It's time to think outside of the dessert box. Savor classic chocolate chip cookie flavor with a warm, soft-baked, cakey texture. Perfect for after-school snacks, parties, an afternoon work treat, or whipping up dessert without an oven!

name: Gluten-Free Single Serve Super Fudge Brownie Mix - 12-Pack
description: Stock up and save with a 12-pack of our single serve Brownie Mix! Ever wished you could have the ultimate chocolatey brownie appear in front of you? Now you can. With our single-serve mixes, you're only half a minute away from warm, gooey, soft-baked deliciousness. Nothing artificial...just the good stuff (and your kids will love them too!) Gluten-free, portable, and ready in 30 seconds! Simply add water and microwave for an individual dessert perfectly portioned for one. All the flavor and experience of a homemade brownie with no prep work and no clean-up...and no need to make an entire batch! Take it anywhere...make it anywhere! It's time to think outside of the dessert box. Made with three kinds of chocolate to give you a decadent brownie with rich, deep flavor and melted pockets of chocolate. Perfect for after-school snacks, parties, an afternoon work treat, or whipping up dessert without an oven! Click here to learn more about allergens and cross-contact prevention

name: Gluten-Free Yellow Cake Mix
description: We've created a gluten-free mix that makes the best ever yellow cake, every time you bake. Turn it into a tender, golden layer cake or make a batch of moist, finely-crumbed cupcakes. You pick the frostings and fillings (sprinkles are optional, but highly recommended). Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes.The result? Mixes that make the finest gluten-free baked goods around. Simple ingredients, reliable results, and deliciousness that everyone can enjoy! Click here to learn more about allergens and cross-contact prevention. Read the blog: An unexpected use for cake mix — cake streusel

name: Golden Brioche Bread Mix
description: You'll be serving fresh bread from the oven in no time. The combination of butter, eggs, and flour come together to create a soft, fluffy, and flavorful bread that is as perfect for French toast as it is for grilled cheese. Its rich buttery taste and brilliant golden color will have you coming back for slice after slice! Homemade bread is one of life's greatest pleasures, and our mixes help you bake it easily at home. Made with only the simple, good, non-GMO ingredients you want and nothing you don't: no artificial sweeteners or flavors, no artificial colors, and no high-fructose corn syrup. Video: How to knead bread dough Video: How to tell if bread dough is fully kneaded

name: Golden Popover Mix and Standard Popover Pan Set
description: Save on this duo of popover essentials! Our delicious mix makes perfect popovers at home; we've paired it with our sturdy, go-to standard popover pan to make hot, buttery, crisp, light-as-air popovers (everyone's favorite bread-basket treat!) at home. The mix is quick and easy to mix up, and bakes light, airy "puffs" with a soft, delicate interior and a golden exterior. We love the design of this pan: the separate wells are connected only at their rims, so oven-hot air circulates freely between them, with sufficient space between each well so they don't crowd. The result? Loftier, higher rising popovers that dome high above the pan! Handles on each end of the pan keep popovers safe from bulky oven mitts as you transport them to your dinner table. The durable cast aluminum pan offers superior baking performance. The pan's shiny finish reflects heat to prevent over-browning of the exterior of your popovers. Nonstick coating helps your popovers release cleanly from the pan. Minneapolis'...

name: Golden Yellow Cake Mix
description: For delicious, tender cake, try our easy Golden Yellow Cake mix. Ideal for cupcakes, bundt-style or layered birthday cakes. Just add butter, eggs & milk. Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes. The best part? We do the measuring and mixing for you. The result? Consistent deliciousness that everyone can enjoy made with simple ingredients that we bake with every day in our kitchens — no artificial colors or flavors, no preservatives, and all non-GMO. Read the blog: An unexpected use for cake mix — cake streusel

name: Corn Chowder
description: You won't believe this tasty soup comes from a mix. If we're not cooking from scratch, we're mixing up delicious soups from Frontier's convenient mixes. Made with the finest natural ingredients, no added salt, no preservatives or MSG, you can taste the difference — our families and friends always ask for the recipe! Bursting with bright yellow and super sweet corn (non-GMO), red peppers and rice, this delightful chowder will have the pickiest eater asking for more. Just add diced potatoes and cream for a special dinner.

name: Irish Soda Bread Mix
description: Bake up a taste of Ireland with this Irish Soda Bread Mix. Made with our Irish-Style Flour (coarsely ground from red whole wheat berries), our Irish Soda Bread has a crunchy crust and a crumbly crumb. Its mild flavor makes it a perfect vehicle for sweet cream butter, a dab of orange marmalade, or your favorite jam. We've been told this soda bread is a little taste of Ireland, but you be the judge. Homemade bread is one of life's greatest pleasures, and our mixes help you bake it easily at home. Made with only the simple, good, non-GMO ingredients you want and nothing you don't: no artificial sweeteners or flavors, no artificial colors, and no high-fructose corn syrup. You'll be serving fresh bread from the oven in no time.
ingredients: Ingredients Ingredients Ingredients Extracts & Flavorings Spices & Pantry Fruit Add-Ins & Jams

name: Keto Wheat Pizza Crust Mix
description: Delicious keto pizza crusts in a flash. Finally, a pizza crust mix that delivers great pizza taste and texture with only 1g of net carbs per serving! Our easy-to-make mix makes it simple to create crisp and chewy, keto-friendly pizza crusts just the way you like them — no compromises necessary. Packaging includes directions to make one or two crusts.
ingredients: Ingredients Ingredients Ingredients Extracts & Flavorings Spices & Pantry Fruit Add-Ins & Jams

name: Lava Cake Mix and Nonstick Baking Cups Set
description: Save on heavenly chocolate Lava Cake Mix and Baking Cups! Made with the best-quality chocolate, dark cocoa, and premium vanilla, our customer favorite Lava Cake Mix makes rich, moist, deep-dark chocolate cakes that creates their own hot fudge sauce as they bake. Just cut them open and enjoy the molten treasure inside. Bake them in our convenient Nonstick Baking Cups (proudly displaying our wheat crown) so the cakes will release easily and cleanly.

name: Lemon Bar Mix
description: Introducing our new Lemon Bar Mix! You asked, and we listened: enjoy delicious lemon bars whenever the craving strikes with our Lemon Bar Mix! This delightful mix delivers a perfect balance of sweet and tart flavors, featuring zesty lemon paired with a crunchy shortbread crust that melts in your mouth. Whether enjoyed as a midday treat, a refreshing dessert after dinner, or a crowd-pleaser at gatherings, these lemon bars are incredibly easy to make and are sure to brighten any occasion. Just add a few simple ingredients, bake, and savor the sunshine in every bite! Serving suggestion: Add powdered sugar for a festive presentation!

name: Lemon Blueberry Scone Mix
description: Lemon Blueberry scones that will knock your blueberry-loving socks off. Reminiscent of a warm sunny kitchen filled with the fragrance of summer ripe berries and tangy citrus, our simple scone mix bakes up tender, buttery Lemon Blueberry Scones studded with sweet, dried blueberries. This King Arthur scone mix makes serving freshly baked homemade scones quick and easy. Perfect for serving at breakfast, an afternoon snack, for yourself, your family, or your guests. Blend, shape, and bake for warm, delicious scones in fewer than 30 minutes.

name: Lemon Ginger Scone Mix
description: The perfect balance of citrus and spice, bright lemon flavor, and zesty ginger come together in harmony in our tender, buttery Lemon Ginger Scones. Freshly baked homemade scones are quick and easy with our simple scone mixes. Perfect for serving at breakfast, an afternoon snack, for yourself, your family, or your guests. Simply blend, shape, and bake for warm, delicious scones in fewer than 30 minutes.

name: Lemon Poppy Seed Muffin and Quick Bread Mix
description: Lemon Poppy Seed Muffins made with buttermilk for an even more tender crumb and delectable flavor. This classic flavor combination—tangy citrus and crunchy poppyseeds—shines in our moist, tender muffins. Or bake up a loaf of lemon poppy seed bread with the same mix! Reach for this mix for an easy breakfast, an impressive brunch sweet, or an afternoon snack. Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes. The best part? We do the measuring and mixing for you. The result? Consistent deliciousness that everyone can enjoy made with simple ingredients that we bake with every day in our kitchens — no artificial colors or flavors, no preservatives, and all non-GMO.
ingredients: Ingredients Ingredients Ingredients Extracts & Flavorings Spices & Pantry Fruit Add-Ins & Jams

name: Lemon Raspberry Muffin and Quick Bread Mix
description: Lemon Raspberry Muffins (or quick bread!) made with buttermilk for a more tender crumb and delectable flavor. Bright, zesty lemon meets sweet, vibrant raspberries. Moist and delicate, these muffins are fantastically fruity with a soft, delicate interior. Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes. The best part? We do the measuring and mixing for you. The result? Consistent deliciousness that everyone can enjoy made with simple ingredients that we bake with every day in our kitchens — no artificial colors or flavors, no preservatives, and all non-GMO.

name: Loaded Potato Soup
description: The quick and easy shortcut to delicious homemade soup. If we're not cooking from scratch, we're mixing up delicious soups from Frontier's convenient mixes. Made with the finest natural ingredients, no added salt, no preservatives or MSG, you can taste the difference — our families and friends always ask for the recipe! This customer-loved mix makes a creamy, chunky, and indulgent family favorite with wonderfully savory flavors. Just add bacon, chicken broth, potatoes, and heavy cream and you've got a steaming hot, homemade soup.

name: Mini Cran-Raspberry White Chocolate Scone Set
description: Bake mini cranberry raspberry white chocolate scones with ease. This convenient set combines our flavorful scone mix with a nonstick Mini Scone Pan to make perfectly portioned 3-bite scones. Our scone mix features tangy dried cranberries, creamy white chocolate chips, and sweet raspberry Jammy Bits, delivering a delightful burst of berry flavor in every bite. Sprinkle with Sparkling Sugar for an extra crunch and shimmer. See all Special Savings»

name: Outrageous Chocolate Chip Cookie Mix
description: Best ever Chocolate Chip Cookies at your fingertips! King Arthur mixes make homemade easy and oh-so delicious. These delightful cookies are LOADED with chocolate, guaranteed to satisfy any sweet craving. Outrageous Chocolate Chip Cookies Mix features bittersweet and semisweet chocolate chips, plus delicious semisweet chocolate chunks, all nestled in a buttery, vanilla-scented cookie. With our mix in your pantry, you're only an egg and some butter away from the irresistible taste of warm, buttery, chocolate chip cookies. Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes. The best part? We do the measuring and mixing for you. The result? Consistent deliciousness that everyone can enjoy made with simple ingredients that we bake with every day in our kitchens — no artificial colors or flavors, no preservatives, and all non-GMO.

name: Pancake Art Kit
description: Because breakfast should never be boring! Bring creativity to the breakfast table with the Color Pancake Art Set! This all-in-one set has the essentials to make light and fluffy, colorful pancakes! Made with vibrant Plant-Based Food Colors derived from natural ingredients — no artificial dyes here — you can flip up countless pancakes with a feel-good twist. Perfect for weekend mornings, birthday breakfasts, or any time you want to add a little whimsy to your stack. Start with simple designs (like shapes, clouds, hearts, and smiley faces), then experiment with more intricate and creative designs as you get comfortable! Goes great with Zojirushi Gourmet Sizzler Electric Griddle!

description: Tender, buttery peach scones, made easy! Made with the finest cream and packed with chewy Peach Jammy Bits, these scones are tender, buttery, and full of bright, sweet flavor. Our mix makes it quick and easy to whip up a batch — just blend, shape, and bake for warm, delicious scones in under 30 minutes. Perfect for breakfast, an afternoon snack, or sharing with family and friends.

name: Perfect Popovers Set
description: Essentials for perfect popovers! With this pan, mix, and scoop set, anyone can bake hot, buttery, crisp, light-as-air popovers (everyone's favorite bread-basket treat!) at home. Use the scoop to get just the right amount of batter for each well (and to scoop more easily and efficiently). Standard popover pan yields delicious results. Six separate wells are connected only at their rims, so oven-hot air circulates freely between them, with sufficient space between each well so they don't crowd. The result? Loftier, higher rising popovers that dome 5" above the pan! Handles on each end of the pan keep popovers safe from bulky oven mitts as you transport them to your dinner table. The durable cast aluminum pan offers superior baking performance. The pan's shiny finish reflects heat to prevent over-browning of the exterior of your popovers. Nonstick coating helps your popovers release cleanly from the pan. Minneapolis' family-owned Nordic Ware company makes this pan right here in the USA.

name: Perfectly Tender Flatbread Mix Kit
description: Experience the joy of bread baking with our Perfectly Tender Flatbread Mix Kit! In a hurry? Or just hungry? In just about an hour, you can enjoy soft and flavorful flatbread, ideal for crafting savory sandwiches or creating restaurant-quality turnovers in the comfort of your kitchen! Our comprehensive kit includes all the essentials: a flatbread mix, yeast packet, and a flavorful za'atar herb blend, ensuring a convenient and delightful baking experience. Simply add water and oil to the mix, follow instructions, and you're ready to go! From the recipe on the back of the box to new recipes online, there are plenty of ways to let your creativity shine. Flatbread can be frozen for ultimate convenience. Bake, cool completely, transfer to an airtight container, and store in your freezer for later. Placing a piece of parchment between flatbreads will make it easier to take out one at a time and reheat individually. See our blog post for more bread-freezing and thawing tips. Makes: Eight 6”...
ingredients: Ingredients Ingredients Ingredients Extracts & Flavorings Spices & Pantry Fruit Add-Ins & Jams

name: Popover Mix
description: Makes light, airy "puffs" with a golden brown exterior. Our Popover Mix makes it easy to enjoy fresh, golden popovers straight from your oven. Light, airy, and perfectly crisp on the outside, they’re a delight at any meal. Serve them at breakfast with jam or honey, pair them with butter for dinner, or get creative with sweet or savory toppings. Fluffy, warm, and irresistible, these popovers are a simple way to bring a touch of bakery magic into your home.

name: Pull-Apart Garlic Bread Mix Kit
description: Experience the joy of bread baking with our Pull-Apart Garlic Bread Mix Kit! Baking fresh Pull-Apart Garlic Bread has never been easier or faster! In just about an hour, you can enjoy the irresistible delight of cheesy Pull-Apart Garlic Bread with the help of our convenient mix kit! This tender treat is filled with a savory blend of herby, buttery goodness, making it the perfect accompaniment to any meal or a satisfying snack on its own. Our convenient kit includes the essentials: a pull-apart bread mix, yeast packet, and garlic bread seasoning, ensuring a hassle-free baking experience. Simply add water and butter to the mix, and you're on your way to enjoying warm, garlic-bread perfection straight from your oven. From the recipe on the back of the box to new recipes online, there are plenty of ways to let your creativity shine! Try new toppings and fillings, like caramelized onions, cured meats, and sautéed vegetables. To make this mix even more time efficient, allow the dough to...

name: Pumpkin Spice Doughnut Mix
description: Mouthwatering, lightly spicy pumpkin doughnuts will have you dreaming of fall, all year round. These delicious doughnuts are BAKED, not deep-fried, so you can enjoy this classic treat guilt-free. Find out just how delicious a baked doughnut can be! Simply blend with your own fresh ingredients, spoon into doughnut pan, and bake. Bake tender pumpkin doughnuts with our easy-to-use mix, then finish them with melted Valhrona dark chocolate for a stunning dessert. Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes. The best part? We do the measuring and mixing for you. The result? Consistent deliciousness that everyone can enjoy made with simple ingredients that we bake with every day in our kitchens — no artificial colors or flavors, no preservatives, and all non-GMO.

name: Pumpkin Spice Scone Mix
description: Pumpkin scones packed with flavor and the goodness of whole grains. Made with real pumpkin, our finest ginger, a touch of molasses, and spiced with cinnamon, clove, and nutmeg, our Pumpkin Spice Scone Mix will have you dreaming of fall all year long. Freshly baked homemade scones are quick and easy with our simple scone mixes. Perfect for serving at breakfast, an afternoon snack, for yourself, your family, or your guests. Simply blend, shape, and bake for warm, delicious scones in fewer than 30 minutes.

name: Quick & Easy Chocolate Mousse Mix
description: This chocolate mousse is the ultimate ingredient for chocolate lovers! We can't say enough good things about this chocolate mousse: While it's ideal for a terrific and simple-to-make chocolate mousse, it also shines in desserts, hot beverages, and more. Add a spoonful to coffee for a delicious mocha, or make a rich and indulgent cup of hot chocolate. We also use it to replace the cocoa in brownie batters for fudgier brownies with a delicate chocolate flavor.  Try our Chocolate Mousse and Dessert Dish Set

name: Quick & Easy Choux Pastry Mix
description: Choux pastry made simple: bake delicious cream puffs, eclairs, and more! Our new Quick & Easy Choux Pastry Mix removes the fear of making cream puffs, eclairs, or profiteroles. Simply mix in a couple of ingredients to make a batter, then spoon or pipe into the desired shape and bake. Fill with our Chocolate Mousse Mix, Pastry Cream Mix, or ice cream, and top with chocolate sauce for an out-of-this-world dessert.

name: Quick & Easy Crème Brûlée Mix
description: Effortless elegance: a dessert that wows! Impress your guests with this easy and quick elegant dessert. Combine mix with cream and milk, heat, and pour into ramekins and chill. Use a torch to caramelize sugar for a sweet, crunchy finish, or caramelize sugar on a parchment-lined sheet pan, crumple, and sprinkle over the creme for a dessert your family or guests will love. Try our Classic Crème Brûlée Ramekins

name: Quick & Easy Panna Cotta Mix
description: An elegant dessert made simple. A small-batch release available for a limited time only. Create an elegant, restaurant-quality dessert at home with our Quick & Easy Panna Cotta Mix! Smooth, creamy, and lightly sweet, this classic Italian treat comes together in just a few simple steps using basic ingredients. Delicious on its own or paired with fresh fruit and toppings, it’s a foolproof choice for effortless entertaining. For a traditional touch, unmold from a ramekin and impress your guests with a beautiful presentation. Try with our Pure Vanilla Plus for a classic flecked vanilla look.

name: Quick & Easy Pastry Cream Mix
description: Traditional pastry cream filling is stirred, cooked, strained. With this easy filling, all you do is stir in milk and refrigerate. No cooking needed, no saucepan to clean — just luscious cream filling! Make rich, elegant vanilla filling, perfect for éclairs, filled cakes, or fruit tarts.

name: Red Raspberry Scone Mix
description: Raspberry scones that are simple, bright, and delicious.. Our simple mix bakes up tender, buttery scones studded with our Raspberry Jammy Bits for a fresh-tasting berry burst with a dreamy vanilla background. Freshly baked homemade scones are quick and easy with our simple scone mixes. Perfect for serving at breakfast, an afternoon snack, for yourself, your family, or your guests. Simply blend, shape, and bake for warm, delicious scones in fewer than 30 minutes.

name: Scottish Toasting Bread Mix
description: A great sandwich bread. This slightly chewy toasting loaf is made with barley flakes for whole grain goodness, oat berries for a hearty texture, and brown sugar for a hint of sweetness. Although its texture and flavors shine when made into toast, it's also great for sandwiches and is a perfect everyday bread. Homemade bread is one of life's greatest pleasures, and our mixes help you bake it easily at home. Made with only the simple, good, non-GMO ingredients you want and nothing you don't: no artificial sweeteners or flavors, no artificial colors, and no high-fructose corn syrup. You'll be serving fresh bread from the oven in no time. Video: How to knead bread dough Video: How to tell if bread dough is fully kneaded

name: Shortbread Cookie Mix
description: Traditional buttery, not-overly-sweet shortbread. Only three things are necessary to have traditional buttery, not-overly-sweet shortbread cookies in minutes: our mix, some butter, and your love and care. Our simple mix makes baking memories easier than ever: just mix in the butter, pat into pan, and bake. Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes. The best part? We do the measuring and mixing for you. The result? Consistent deliciousness that everyone can enjoy made with simple ingredients that we bake with every day in our kitchens — no artificial colors or flavors, no preservatives, and all non-GMO.

name: Simple And Easy Crêpe Mix
description: Classic crêpes are easy with this quick mix! Awake to a Parisian delicacy any day of the week with the help of our easy-to-make crêpes mix! Ultra-thin and delicate with the butteriest crisp edges, our mix is perfect for making sweet or savory classic crêpes, blintzes, and more. It's as simple as adding eggs and water, then cook and serve! Crêpes are the perfect canvas for creativity – fill or top with your favorite ingredients for an out-of-this-world breakfast treat. Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes. The best part? We do the measuring and mixing for you. The result? Consistent deliciousness that everyone can enjoy made with simple ingredients that we bake with every day in our kitchens — no artificial colors or flavors, no preservatives, and all non-GMO.

name: Soft & Chewy Pretzel Bites Mix Kit
description: Experience the joy of bread baking with our Soft & Chewy Pretzel Bites Mix Kit! Baking pretzel bites has never been easier or faster! Ready in just about an hour, this convenient mix kit brings together everything you need for a hassle-free pretzel-making experience. Each bite-sized treat promises a soft, chewy texture that's irresistible for snacking, dipping, or sharing with friends and family. Inside, you'll find all the essentials: a soft pretzel mix, glaze, yeast packet, and pretzel salt. Just add water and oil, follow instructions, and you're moments away from savory pretzel perfection. From the recipe on the back of the box to new recipes online, there are plenty of ways to let your creativity shine. A tip from our Test Kitchen: If you're having trouble rolling the dough into 15" strands, cover it and allow it to rest for 10 minutes, then continue rolling. Makes: 40 Soft & Chewy Pretzel Bites 32 Pretzel Pigs in Blankets 6 Soft & Chewy Pretzel Buns
ingredients: Ingredients Ingredients Ingredients Extracts & Flavorings Spices & Pantry Fruit Add-Ins & Jams

name: Soft White Dinner Roll Mix
description: These classic white dinner rolls are light, delicate, and perfectly soft inside. They're the star at any dinner and melt in your mouth when fresh from the oven. They can also be made into a loaf for sandwiches or toast. Homemade bread is one of life's greatest pleasures, and our mixes help you bake it easily at home. Made with only the simple, good, non-GMO ingredients you want and nothing you don't: no artificial sweeteners or flavors, no artificial colors, and no high-fructose corn syrup. You'll be serving fresh bread from the oven in no time.
ingredients: Ingredients Ingredients Ingredients Extracts & Flavorings Spices & Pantry Fruit Add-Ins & Jams

name: Strawberries & Cream Scone Mix
description: Bring the taste of a perfect summer pairing to the table with our Strawberries and Cream Scones. Made with our Strawberry Jammy Bits for a bright burst of fruity flavor, and cream for a rich, tender crumb. Freshly baked homemade scones are quick and easy with our simple scone mixes. Perfect for serving at breakfast, an afternoon snack, for yourself, your family, or your guests. Simply blend, shape, and bake for warm, delicious scones in fewer than 30 minutes.

name: Sugar Cookie Mix
description: No kitchen cupboard should be without a box of this Sugar Cookie Mix. With our mix in your pantry, you're only an egg and some butter away from the irresistible taste of warm, crisp sugar cookies. This dough is perfect for rolling and cutting; you can mix it with add-ins if you like and scoop like a drop cookie, too. Decorating cookies can be a lot of fun when you have a little help from our cookie decorating guide.

name: Pizza Crust Mix
description: Made with all-purpose and semolina flours, our pizza dough mix is quick, easy to use, and versatile. Pizza Dough Flavor adds a cheesy garlicky kick to your crust. Just add water and oil (yeast is included), then knead, allow to rise, shape, and bake. Ideal for making perfect homemade pizza crust, breadsticks, rolls, focaccia, or flatbread. Homemade bread is one of life's greatest pleasures, and our mixes help you bake it easily at home. Made with only the simple, good, non-GMO ingredients you want and nothing you don't: no artificial sweeteners or flavors, no artificial colors, and no high-fructose corn syrup. You'll be serving fresh bread from the oven in no time.

name: Tortilla Soup
description: Just add broth, cooked chicken, and salsa, simmer, and serve. If we're not cooking from scratch, we're mixing up delicious soups from Frontier's convenient mixes. Made with the finest natural ingredients, no added salt, no preservatives or MSG, you can taste the difference — our families and friends always ask for the recipe! With a soup this good, full of zesty Mexican spices, quick cooking black beans, peppers and sweet corn, you’ll want to host a party. Just add chicken, salsa, and broth for a festive dinner ready in 30 minutes. Create your own toppings bar for a special treat!

name: Ultimate Chocolate Doughnut Mix
description: These moist, super-rich chocolate doughnuts are *serving* breakfast hero. Simply blend with your own fresh ingredients, spoon into doughnut pan, and bake. Doughnut mix includes three different cocoas, including ultra-dark black cocoa. Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes. The best part? We do the measuring and mixing for you. The result? Consistent deliciousness that everyone can enjoy made with simple ingredients that we bake with every day in our kitchens — no artificial colors or flavors, no preservatives, and all non-GMO.
ingredients: Ingredients Ingredients Ingredients Extracts & Flavorings Spices & Pantry Fruit Add-Ins & Jams

name: Vanilla Cream Scone Mix
description: Vanilla Cream scones are a teatime classic we can't get enough of! Made with fragrant vanilla beans, our Vanilla Cream scones have a not-too-sweet delicate vanilla flavor, making them perfect for customizing to your particular taste by adding additional ingredients like raisins or other dried fruits. Freshly baked homemade scones are quick and easy with our simple scone mixes. Perfect for serving at breakfast, an afternoon snack, for yourself, your family, or your guests. Simply blend, shape, and bake for warm, delicious scones in fewer than 30 minutes.

name: Vermont Cheddar Bread Mix
description: Cheese, please! Soft, moist, and savory, this cheesy loaf is made with our own real sharp cheddar cheese powder and semolina flour for added texture. Can also be made into buns and rolls. Homemade bread is one of life's greatest pleasures, and our mixes help you bake it easily at home. Made with only the simple, good, non-GMO ingredients you want and nothing you don't: no artificial sweeteners or flavors, no artificial colors, and no high-fructose corn syrup. You'll be serving fresh bread from the oven in no time. Video: How to knead bread dough Video: How to tell if bread dough is fully kneaded

name: Vermont Maple Oat Scone Mix
description: Made with pure Vermont maple sugar that shines through beautifully, together with molasses, and the finest quality oats, our simple mix bakes up tender, buttery, Vermont Maple Oat Scones. Freshly baked homemade scones are quick and easy with our simple scone mixes. Perfect for serving at breakfast, an afternoon snack, for yourself, your family, or your guests. Simply blend, shape, and bake for warm, delicious scones in fewer than 30 minutes.

name: Vermont Maple Pecan Muffin and Quick Bread Mix
description: Made with Vermont maple syrup and buttermilk for an even more tender crumb and delectable flavor. Classic Vermont maple sugar sweetens every bite of these tender muffins. Studded with crunchy pecans, they're an easy and quick breakfast with exceptional flavor. Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes. The best part? We do the measuring and mixing for you. The result? Consistent deliciousness that everyone can enjoy made with simple ingredients that we bake with every day in our kitchens — no artificial colors or flavors, no preservatives, and all non-GMO.

name: Very Berry Scone Mix
description: A bite of a Very Berry Scone is a bite of summer bliss. Capture the essence of the season with our simple mix that bakes up tender, buttery Very Berry Scones studded with our Raspberry, Blueberry, and Strawberry Jammy Bits for a medley of fresh fruit flavors. Freshly baked homemade scones are quick and easy with our simple scone mixes. Perfect for serving at breakfast, an afternoon snack, for yourself, your family, or your guests. Simply blend, shape, and bake for warm, delicious scones in fewer than 30 minutes.
ingredients: Ingredients Ingredients Ingredients Extracts & Flavorings Spices & Pantry Fruit Add-Ins & Jams

name: White Icing Mix
description: The perfect royal icing, the fluffiest white frosting, or smooth glaze. Ideal for sugar cookie decorating, this mix can be made as a thin glaze, beaten longer to make a stiff white icing (perfect for raised decorating and assembling the walls of a gingerbread house), or made into a light and fluffy cupcake or cake frosting. Great to have around; a time-saver and multi-tasker, too. Our mixes are carefully crafted in our test kitchen through meticulous taste-testing (it's a tough job, but we're up to the challenge!) and blending to replicate our favorite recipes. The best part? We do the measuring and mixing for you. The result? Consistent deliciousness that everyone can enjoy, made with simple ingredients we bake with every day in our kitchens — no artificial colors or flavors, no preservatives, and all non-GMO.
ingredients: Ingredients Ingredients Ingredients Extracts & Flavorings Spices & Pantry Fruit Add-Ins & Jams

name: English Muffin Mix
description: Fresh, homemade English muffins are a special treat. English muffins, hot off the griddle — who knew we could make our own so easily? Our English Muffin Mix combines half of our White Whole Wheat and All-Purpose Flour for the perfect balance of tender texture and rich flavor. Delicious with butter and jam, or as the base for your favorite breakfast sandwich.
